examples: All fresh assemblies should first be polished with aspic.
As Jessica Grose wrote in Slate, men seem "fixed in cultural aspic."
The aspic is one kind of strongly fragrant purple blue color floret.
These flecks of aspic are scarcely heinous, but cumulatively they suggest an overindulgent hospitality toward the material.
But this presumes that public opinion has been frozen in aspic since 1973.
